name: Nettie's Spicy Peach Nut Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Peaches; or apricots, canned, 16 oz
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease and flour a 9x5 or 8x4 loaf pan.
2. Lightly spoon flour into measuring cup, level off.
3. In a mixer, blend all ingredients except nuts and raisins at low speed until moistened.
4. Beat for 2 minutes at medium speed, scraping the bowl occasionally.
5. Stir in nuts and raisins.
6. Pour batter into prepared pan.
7. Bake 60-70 minutes until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Remove from pan immediately.
